topics.title: AI Announcements
topics.executive_summary: No major AI announcement news was published in the last 24 hours that could be confirmed through search results, suggesting a quiet day in the sector.

topics.title: Startups
topics.executive_summary: AI-powered enterprise tools dominate June 9 funding, with massive rounds flowing into cloud cost optimization (PointFive's $60M Series B), industrial design platforms (PhysicsX's $300M Series C), and AI security startups combating emerging threats.

stories.headline: PhysicsX raises $300M Series C for industrial AI design.
stories.body: London-based PhysicsX closed a $300 million Series C led by Temasek, targeting AI applications in aerospace, semiconductors, and defense — signaling investor appetite for AI-driven efficiency in capital-intensive industries.

stories.headline: PointFive nabs $60M Series B for cloud cost AI tools.
stories.body: New York-based PointFive raised $60 million in Series B funding led by Accel to scale its AI platform that helps enterprises cut cloud and compute costs — reflecting investor focus on operational efficiency over hype.

stories.headline: A Security, InfoHawk raise for AI-driven threat detection.
stories.body: A Security ($37M, backed by Lightspeed and Cyberstarts) and InfoHawk ($2.25M, led by ex-FTC Chair Jon Leibowitz) closed funding to tackle AI-enabled security threats — autonomous pentesting and AI misinformation detection.

stories.headline: Edge Markets raises $29.2M for blockchain trading.
stories.body: New York-based Edge Markets secured $29.2 million led by CoinFund for blockchain trading products, part of a broader wave of fintech/crypto funding as regulatory clarity improves.
